changes.description: Standardized Gutenberg block sidebars (InspectorControls) for consistent UI/UX.
Resolved console warnings in block editor for improved stability.

changes: ⚡ PERFORMANCE: Overall code optimization and performance improvements.
🔧 REFACTORING: CSS architecture cleanup and refactoring for better maintainability.
🎨 MARKUP: Updated HTML structure for the Availability Calendar for better accessibility and design.
🌐 i18n: Added new translation files and improved existing strings.
🚀 TRANSFER MODULE: Finalized prefix standardization (rentiva_) and database migration logic.
🛡️ SECURITY: Replaced wp_redirect with wp_safe_redirect in Handler.php for enhanced redirection safety.
🎨 STANDARDS: Refactored inline styles in Restrictions.php to use wp_add_inline_style API.
⚡ PERFORMANCE: Replaced direct SQL transient deletion with native delete_transient() in AbstractShortcode.php using a versioning system.
🔒 SECURITY: Modernized SecurityHelper::safe_output() with context validation and JSON support.
🐛 BUG FIX: Resolved issue with vehicle feature icons (fuel, transmission, etc.) disappearing in the Booking Form.
🎨 UI: Optimized visual presentation and icon sizing in the Booking Form.
🔧 CODE IMPROVEMENT: Corrected logic errors in vehicle feature data processing regarding SVGs.
✨ FEATURE: Added 'Weekend Difference' display in the Booking Form price breakdown.
🧹 CLEANUP: Removed conflicting legacy CSS codes and transitioned to a modern structure.
🛡️ SECURITY FIX: 50+ WPCS issues resolved (Input Sanitization & DB Interpolation).
🛡️ SECURITY FIX: Hardened `Handler.php` and `AccountController.php` against XSS.
🔧 REFACTOR: Replaced legacy `error_log` with `AdvancedLogger`.
🛡️ SECURITY: Hardened output escaping in About, System Info, and Admin Tabs using esc_html and wp_kses_post.
🔒 DATA INTEGRITY: Enhanced sanitization for price and ID fields in AddonManager and Booking Meta Boxes.
🌐 LOCALIZATION: Translated remaining Turkish administrative strings in Manual Booking and Vehicle management to English.
🎨 UI FIX: Resolved hardcoded currency symbol issues in Booking Edit screens for better multi-currency support.
🧹 CLEANUP: Optimized SQL queries with proper preparation in Vehicle Columns and System Info classes.
🛡️ SECURITY: SQL Injection protection hardened for message search queries using prepared statements.
📡 REST API: Completely refactored Integration Settings to ensure backend AJAX button reliability.
🌐 STANDARDS: Full source code documentation (comments/docblocks) translated to English for WPCS compliance.
🔄 RELIABILITY: Improved AJAX hook registration to prevent '-1' errors on asynchronous requests.
🐛 BUG FIX: Resolved IP list sanitization errors in REST settings preventing user input saves.
🛡️ SECURITY AUDIT: Comprehensive security audit completed for all 22 modules (91+ patches applied).
🔒 NONCE HARDENING: All nonce verifications now use sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash()) wrapper for WPCS compliance.
✅ WPCS COMPLIANCE: Plugin now fully complies with WordPress Coding Standards for security operations.
🐛 LINT FIXES: Fixed PHP 8.4+ implicit nullable parameter deprecation warnings.
🔧 CODE QUALITY: Fixed Exception namespace issues and undefined method calls across multiple files.
🛡️ CRITICAL UPDATE: Comprehensive DatabaseCleaner meta key protection to prevent potential data loss during maintenance.
🛍️ WOOCOMMERCE: Atomic Overlap Lock mechanism added to prevent duplicate bookings during high traffic.
💰 TAX FIX: Resolved tax calculation issue for deposit payments (now calculates based on total amount).
🔒 SECURITY: SQL queries hardened with prepared statements in BookingColumns and ExportStats.
🎨 UI: Added informative notice in Payment Settings when WooCommerce integration is active.
🚀 FRAMEWORK TRANSFORMATION: Core (Mandatory) and Attribute (Optional) fields separated.
🔧 DYNAMIC ATTRIBUTES: Standard fields like Fuel Type, Transmission can now be removed from settings.
✨ CLEAN SLATE: Reset Settings now provides a clean state with no forced defaults.
🛡️ CALCULATION SAFETY: System defaults to 'Full Payment' mode if Deposit field is removed.
📚 DOCUMENTATION: Added Framework Architecture guide.
🚀 NEW MODULE: VIP Transfer Module (Chauffeur Service) added.
🗺️ ROUTE MANAGEMENT: Location and Route management in Admin Panel.
💰 FLEXIBLE PRICING: Fixed or Distance-based pricing engine.
💳 CART & PAYMENT: WooCommerce cart integration with Deposit or Full Payment options.
🔍 ADVANCED SEARCH: AJAX-based transfer search form via [mhm_rentiva_transfer_search] shortcode.
🛡️ OPERATIONAL CONTROL: Buffer time support for vehicle availability checks.
🔒 DATA INTEGRITY: Saving transfer specifics (origin/dest, pax) to booking orders.
🎨 FRONTEND POLISH: Fixed "Out of Use" badge logic and standardizing placement. Fixed mobile overflow issues on Vehicle Details.
💄 SEARCH UI: Standardized button colors (blue theme) and added "Out of Use" status indicators on Search Results.
⚖️ COMPARISON UI: Improved card alignment, button styling, and removed inline styles on Comparison Page.
❤️ FAVORITES UI: Added "Out of Use" badge and disabled booking button for unavailable vehicles on My Favorites.
📅 BOOKINGS UI: Optimized table layout (shortened headers, compact buttons) to prevent horizontal scrolling.
🌍 LOCALIZATION: Added missing strings to POT file.
🚀 REFACTORING: Major refactoring of the settings core to improve modularity and maintainability.
🛍️ WOOCOMMERCE: Conditional logic to hide Payment Settings when WooCommerce is active.
📧 EMAIL SETTINGS: Fixed inaccessible Email Settings when WooCommerce active.
🐛 BUG FIX: Restored missing OfflinePayment.php class (Fatal Error fix).
🌍 LOCALIZATION: Updated POT file with new strings.
🛠️ SETTINGS CLEANUP: Removed redundancy in settings (Button texts, Form labels) for a cleaner admin interface.
📝 REFUND POLICY: Added customizable Refund Policy text setting in System Messages.
🔗 URL SETTINGS: Renamed "Frontend URL and Text Settings" to "Page URL Settings" for clarity.
🐛 ENDPOINT FIX: Resolved issue where custom endpoint slugs were not being respected in `AccountController`.
🎨 UI IMPROVEMENT: Removed redundant "View Dashboard" button from Booking Details view.
🔧 POT GENERATION: Fixed `make-pot` issues by refactoring settings rendering logic to standard loops.
🛡️ GITIGNORE: Added development tools to gitignore.
🇹🇷 LOCALIZATION: Added "Page URL Settings" to POT file and improved Turkish translation support.
🚀 VERSION UPDATE: Major update to 4.5.0 focusing on User Account and Payment History improvements.
🔧 ACCOUNT ENDPOINTS: Added customizable endpoints for Bookings, Favorites, Payments, Messages, and Edit Account.
💳 PAYMENT HISTORY: Enhanced Payment History page with receipt upload preview and "Remove Receipt" functionality using secure AJAX.
🧾 RECEIPT MANAGEMENT: Added backend logic to securely delete receipt attachments when requested by the user.
📊 BOOKING DETAILS: Improved "View" button functionality in My Account to correctly link to the Booking Detail view.
🎨 UI MODERNIZATION: Redesigned the Bookings table in My Account with improved spacing, typography, and hover effects.
🔒 PASSWORD TOGGLES: Fixed "blue box" issue and visibility of password toggle buttons on Account Details page by enqueuing Dashicons and resetting default styles.
🛠️ BUG FIXES: Resolved Fatal Error in BookingColumns.php and WooCommerce endpoint conflicts.
🔗 URL HANDLING: Updated SettingsSanitizer to allow relative paths for endpoint settings.
💱 PAYMENT DISPLAY: Improved payment status translation and display of real payment method names (e.g., Credit Card) instead of gateway slugs.
📦 VERSION UPDATE: Version bump to 4.4.5 for maintenance and stability improvements.
🎨 ELEMENTOR WIDGETS: Enhanced Elementor integration with 19 comprehensive widgets covering all plugin features - vehicle display, booking forms, account management, and more.
🧩 WIDGET CATEGORY: All MHM Rentiva widgets organized under dedicated 'MHM Rentiva' category in Elementor for easy discovery.
⚙️ WIDGET CONTROLS: Advanced styling and customization options added to all Elementor widgets with full control over layout, typography, colors, and spacing.
📱 RESPONSIVE DESIGN: All Elementor widgets fully responsive with mobile-first approach and Elementor's responsive controls support.
🔧 WIDGET INTEGRATION: Seamless integration with Elementor's live preview, drag-and-drop builder, and template system.
🚗 VEHICLE LIMITS: All hardcoded vehicle limits made configurable (engine size: 0.0-20.0L, seats: max 100, doors: max 20, gallery: max 50 images).
⛽ FUEL TYPES: Added LPG, CNG, and Hydrogen fuel types to support alternative fuel vehicles.
⚙️ TRANSMISSION TYPES: Added Semi-Automatic and CVT transmission options for modern vehicles.
💳 WOOCOMMERCE REFUNDS: Complete WooCommerce refund integration - automatic booking status updates when refunds are processed in WooCommerce.
🔄 REFUND SYSTEM: RefundValidator now supports WooCommerce payments (previously only offline).
💱 DYNAMIC CURRENCY: Currency defaults now dynamically retrieved from WooCommerce or plugin settings (no hardcoded TRY).
✅ THANK YOU PAGE: New dedicated thank you page shortcode [rentiva_thank_you] for booking confirmations.
📝 BOOKING ENHANCEMENTS: Added booking reference number (BK- prefix), booking type (Online/Manual), and special notes/requests fields.
🚗 VEHICLE SELECTION: Vehicle field in booking edit is now editable with license plate display to avoid confusion.
🧹 FORM CLEANUP: Removed redundant fields from booking form (Contact Info, Payment Method, Terms checkbox) - now handled by WooCommerce.
💳 CHECKOUT INTEGRATION: Payment type options (Deposit/Full Payment) moved to WooCommerce checkout page.
📱 SINGLE COLUMN FORM: Booking form redesigned as single-column layout for better mobile experience.
⏰ TIME FIELDS: Pickup time is now mandatory, return time automatically matches pickup time and is non-editable.
🎨 MODERN UI: Availability check result area redesigned with modern gradients, icons, and animations.
🔒 DUPLICATE PREVENTION: Enhanced atomic overlap checking to prevent duplicate reservations for same vehicle/dates.
⏰ AUTO-CANCEL: Fixed automatic cancellation system for unpaid bookings (30-minute deadline).
🔑 META KEY STANDARDIZATION: Unified date/time meta keys (_mhm_start_date, _mhm_end_date, _mhm_start_time, _mhm_end_time) with backward compatibility.
🛡️ AVAILABILITY VALIDATION: Added final availability check before WooCommerce payment processing to prevent payment for unavailable vehicles.
📧 EMAIL SYSTEM: Fixed email template auto-loading in admin booking edit page.
🌍 i18n: Updated .pot file with all new translatable strings.
🗑️ LEGACY REMOVAL: Removed all legacy payment gateway code (Stripe, PayPal, PayTR) to focus on Offline payments and WooCommerce integration.
🧹 CLEANUP: Removed unused assets and rate limiting logic related to legacy gateways.
📚 DOCUMENTATION: Updated READMEs and documentation to reflect the new payment system focus.
🔒 SECURITY: Removed hardcoded secure token and implemented dynamic key generation for enhanced security.
🏗️ REFACTORING: Separated settings page view logic into SettingsView class for better maintainability.
🐛 BUG FIX: Resolved automatic booking cancellation cron job issue.
✅ COMPLIANCE: Added WordPress.org standard readme.txt and license headers.
🧹 CLEANUP: Centralized sanitization helpers and removed manual require_once calls.
🌍 GLOBAL READINESS: Completed English translations across Elementor widgets, Gutenberg blocks, payment gateways, booking helpers, and templates.

🧩 ELEMENTOR & GUTENBERG: Vehicles List, Booking Form, and Vehicle Card widgets expose English titles, descriptions, and control labels; Gutenberg scripts mirror the same terminology to satisfy Poedit.
📝 I18N QA: Added translator comments and positional placeholders throughout booking emails, account pages, and admin notices to eliminate wp i18n / Poedit warnings.
💱 CURRENCY & DEPOSITS: Deposit meta boxes and helpers now format prices via Settings-based currency (USD fallback) and semantic data attributes instead of hardcoded TRY.
📚 DOCUMENTATION: README badges and release notes updated to describe the 4.4.1 global readiness push.
🧙 SETUP WIZARD: Expanded to seven guided steps with consistent back buttons, login/register/contact checks, and a Shortcode Pages shortcut
🔐 LICENSE SYNC: Wizard now reads the real LicenseManager state so active keys appear as Ready without re-entering
💳 PAYMENT & FRONTEND: Wizard steps reuse the same currency and position dropdowns as the main settings for accurate defaults
🩺 SYSTEM CHECK: Email Delivery detection recognises SMTP providers (FluentSMTP, WP Mail SMTP, Post SMTP, etc.) before raising warnings
📚 DOCUMENTATION: Added docs/site/getting-started/setup-wizard guide and linked it from the admin documentation index
🎨 UI POLISH: Unified wizard tab styling, added universal back buttons, and removed duplicate menu entries for a cleaner experience
📋 SHORTCODES: Required Pages step validates/login/register/contact shortcodes and the docs highlight the mandatory shortcode mappings
❤️ FAVORITES: Unified nonce handling, AJAX toggle, and clear-all endpoints across grid, list, and My Account favorites
💬 NOTIFICATIONS: Standardized toast styling/animation for all frontend shortcodes
🎨 UI POLISH: Improved vehicle grid/list layouts, mobile buttons, calendar spacing, and responsive account favorites
🚗 VEHICLE LIST: Corrected year and mileage icon mappings with default icon fallback
🧰 DEFAULT METADATA: Auto-populate vehicle details, features, and equipment on fresh installs
⚙️ QUICK EDIT: Fixed availability/status sync, removed legacy Passive/In Progress labels, and ensured accurate counts
📚 DOCUMENTATION: Expanded docs/site with admin page guides, getting-started steps, and updated testing checklists
🌍 CENTRALIZED CURRENCY SYSTEM: CurrencyHelper class created for unified currency symbol management (47 currencies)
🌐 CENTRALIZED LANGUAGE SYSTEM: LanguageHelper class created for unified locale/language management (60+ languages)
🔧 CURRENCY CONSISTENCY: All hardcoded currency symbol lists replaced with CurrencyHelper across 14+ files
🌍 LANGUAGE CONSISTENCY: All hardcoded locale mappings replaced with LanguageHelper across plugin files
📊 SETTINGS UNIFICATION: Settings.php, SettingsCore.php, PayPalSettings.php now use centralized currency lists
⚙️ CENTRALIZED MANAGEMENT: Currency and language definitions managed from single source (CurrencyHelper, LanguageHelper)
🔗 FILTER HOOKS: CurrencyHelper filter hook registered for template compatibility
📱 GLOBAL READINESS: Plugin now fully ready for global markets with consistent currency and language support
✅ CODE QUALITY: Eliminated duplicate currency/language definitions across multiple files
🎯 MAINTAINABILITY: Single source of truth for currencies and languages - easy to extend
💬 MESSAGES SYSTEM REFACTORING: MessageUrlHelper class created for centralized message URL management
🔗 MESSAGE URLS: All hardcoded admin URLs in message system replaced with dynamic MessageUrlHelper calls
🐛 MESSAGE CACHE FIX: MessageCache::clear_message_cache() now accepts int|string|null to prevent TypeError
📝 MESSAGE CONTENT FIX: get_thread_messages() now uses WP_Query and ensures post_content is always loaded
🔄 THREAD DISPLAY FIX: render_message_thread() enhanced with fallback logic and multiple content loading methods
🔧 REPLY FUNCTIONALITY: SendReply.php fixed for proper thread_id handling (UUID string support)
📋 BULK ACTIONS FIX: Headers already sent error fixed by moving handle_bulk_actions() before any output
🌐 MESSAGE i18n: All Turkish comments in message system files translated to English
✅ MESSAGE URLS: Message list, view, reply, edit, and settings URLs now use centralized MessageUrlHelper
🔗 FRONTEND INTEGRATION: Frontend message URLs now use AccountController::get_account_url() for dynamic generation
🌐 REST API INTEGRATION: Complete REST API settings integration into Integration Settings tab
🔑 API KEYS MANAGEMENT: Full API key management system with create, list, revoke, and delete functionality
📋 AVAILABLE ENDPOINTS: Real-time REST API endpoints list with namespace and method information
🔄 RESET TO DEFAULTS: Reset to defaults button added to all settings tabs (General, Booking, Payment, Email, etc.)
🔒 REST API SECURITY: Rate limiting, token management, HTTPS enforcement, IP whitelist/blacklist settings
⚙️ REST SETTINGS: Comprehensive REST API configuration (rate limits, cache, development mode, security)
🎨 UI/UX IMPROVEMENTS: DatePicker header redesigned with flexbox layout
📅 DATEPICKER STYLING: Removed select-specific styles, improved header centering
🔧 FORM LABELS FIX: Contact Information labels (First Name, Last Name, Email, Phone) visibility fixed
✅ BUTTON TEXT FIX: Make Booking button text visibility and validation state fixed
👤 USERNAME GENERATION: Username now generated from first/last name instead of email
🔐 CUSTOMER ROLE: WordPress Customer role registration system implemented
🐛 BOOKING SETTINGS FIX: Cancellation Deadline (Hours) field saving issue resolved
🔧 TAB SANITIZATION: Fixed Booking Management tab detection in sanitization logic
📝 USER CREATION: Updated user creation in BookingForm, ManualBooking, AddCustomerPage
🌍 i18n SUPPORT: Added fallback translations for form labels and button texts
✅ FORM VALIDATION: Simplified Make Booking button validation (controlled by Terms checkbox)
🎯 CODE QUALITY: Improved username generation with sanitization and uniqueness checks
📱 RESPONSIVE: Enhanced date picker header for better mobile compatibility
🎛️ SETTINGS CONSOLIDATION: Complete settings architecture cleanup and optimization
🗑️ DUPLICATE REMOVAL: Removed 9 unused register_* functions from SettingsCore
🔧 FAKE SECTIONS FIX: Removed non-existent email_notifications and booking_payment sections
✅ MISSING SECTIONS ADDED: AddonSettings properly integrated into Booking tab
🎯 SETTINGS AUDIT: All 23 registered sections verified and properly rendered
📊 SYSTEM & PERFORMANCE: 10+ settings groups consolidated and optimized
🎛️ TAB ISOLATION: Granular tab-specific sanitization prevents cross-tab conflicts
🔒 CHECKBOX FIX: Fixed checkbox saving issues across all settings tabs
📧 EMAIL SYSTEM QA: Comprehensive email settings and notifications verification
🎨 EMAIL TEMPLATES: Modern responsive design for all 19 email templates
📝 TEMPLATE OVERRIDES: Admin can override email subjects and content from settings

❌ REPORTS TAB REMOVED: Duplicate consolidated into main Reports page

🌐 i18n COMPLIANCE: Full internationalization support with proper textdomain loading
